description: The Racer II from puma for the urban style maven. Perfect for a casual do or a friendly game with the neighbourhood kids, this shoe is as comfy as it is stylish.UpperSynthetic upper for a cool combination of look and texturepuma formstripe for an iconic lookLogo tag at the tongue for styleSoft textile lining for comfortPadded tongue and collar for extra cushioningMidsoleLightweight cushy midsole for supreme comfort and supportOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured patterning for maximum grip and traction on various surfacesShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
